station.title: Student feedback layer
station.description: Student-facing root causes, recommendations, and feedback text.

metrics.adaptive_feedback:
=== ROOT CAUSES OF YOUR PERFORMANCE ===

Planning & Preparation (Priority: HIGH)
Your essay would benefit from pre-writing planning. Try: 1) Write thesis first, 2) Create outline, 3) Gather evidence, 4) Write draft, 5) Revise

Time Management (Priority: HIGH)
You appear to have written under time pressure. Start assignments early to allow time for revision and improvement.

=== FOR YOUR PROFILE (Efficient Learners - Low effort, acceptable results) ===
Focus on consistent effort and reflection on your writing.

=== SPECIFIC ACTIONS YOU SHOULD TAKE ===
1. RECOMMEND_BRAINSTORM: Student should spend time planning before writing
2. RECOMMEND_TIME_MANAGEMENT: Encourage early start and distributed effort

=== KEY INSIGHT ===
Your main challenge is organizing thoughts before writing.

=== RULE-BASED DIAGNOSTIC FEEDBACK ===
The essay's organization requires significant improvement. Cohesion between ideas is weak.; Excellent! Seeking assistance demonstrates awareness of your learning needs and a strong commitment to improvement.
Strategic feedback on structure; Dialogic scaffolding

=== RECOMMENDED INTERVENTIONS ===
توفير قالب تنظيم الفقرات; تقديم أمثلة لفقرات منظمة جيداً; تمرين توصيل الأفكار; تقديم إثراء إضافي; جلسة حوار توضيحي; تشجيع وتعزيز السلوك الإيجابي
Paragraph restructuring with model; Clarification conference
مواد متقدمة وتحديات إضافية
تعزيز وإثراء
recommendations: RECOMMEND_BRAINSTORM: Student should spend time planning before writing
RECOMMEND_TIME_MANAGEMENT: Encourage early start and distributed effort
